channel.title: Posts on Ray Schneider
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ray Schneider

item.title: Team Transformation: From App Admins to DevOps
item.description: Quick Note This post is about transformation. It isn’t a tech transformation story but a technical teams transformation from being specialized ‘application administrators’ to becoming ‘devops engineers.’ The names of individuals, companies, etc, have all be either changed or left out in order to protect their privacy, but the reader can understand that this is a story from my professional past in a leadership role. A little background to give some industry contexts for these transformations is in order.

item.title: Interests
The Posting Plan
item.description: Brief History I’ve never managed to be very consistent at doing this. I think it part its because I do not want to contribute to the mess that is online these days. That said, I find it incredibly fun to learn from others on the internet. So I keep revisiting this idea of writing regularly on my own site for the benefit of others. This is my latest attempt beginning here in 2026.

item.title: Core Values
item.description: For many years I have shared the following Core Values with teams and places I have worked. I figured why not share them here. Now to be quite honest, I do not recall any longer if I built these on top of something else, or if I just generated these from my own thoughts. So any semblance to others is a happy accident of like mindedness. Over the years, I have modified the wording a bit.

item.title: Start Again in 2026
item.description: A blog reboot… been a lot going on and I figure a reset is in order. I look forward to posting regularly, on what cadence I have not decided yet. I hope to provide interesting content. This will likely be very tech centric generally. If a post isn’t I will tag it in some way Thanks for coming by!
